sections.heading: Sector 1: Rettifilo (Turn 1–2, Variante del Rettifilo)
sections.body:
• Main straight

• Deploy ERS fully — top speed is king.

• Slipstreaming is critical in both qualifying and the race.

• Turns 1–2 (First Chicane)

• Brake just after the 150m board; it’s a heavy, tricky stop.

• Attack the first curb, but don’t overcut the second curb or you’ll spin or get a penalty.

• Watch traction on exit; avoid wheelspin.

sections.heading: Sector 2: Curva Grande to Ascari
sections.body:
• Turn 3 (Curva Grande)

• Flat-out right-hander; use it to close up or defend.

• Stay smooth on the steering to minimize tire scrub.

• Turns 4–5 (Variante della Roggia)

• Brake at about 100m; attack the first sausage curb, but keep control.

• Second curb is tighter — focus on a clean exit, as it leads into Lesmo.

• Turns 6–7 (Lesmo 1 & 2)

• Lesmo 1: Brake around the 50m board, slightly trail the brakes in, and keep tight.

• Lesmo 2: Slightly faster, but you must get a strong exit onto the long back straight.

sections.heading: Sector 3: Ascari and Parabolica
sections.body:
• Turns 8–10 (Ascari Chicane)

• Brake just before the 100m board.

• Attack the first left curb, balance the car through the middle, and don’t overrun the right-hand exit curb or you’ll invalidate the lap.

• Carry momentum.

• Turn 11 (Parabolica / Curva Alboreto)

• Brake gently (about 50m), trail brake in, and focus fully on the exit.

• Get on the throttle as early as you can without running wide — this exit sets up the long start-finish straight.

Car

trackGuide.setupTips:
Setup Tips

• Wings: Very low (minimum) — prioritize top speed.

• Suspension: Stiff enough to handle curbs but soft enough for traction out of slow chicanes.

• Brakes: High pressure; you need maximum stopping power.

• Differential: Closed on throttle for strong traction; open on coast to help rotation into slow corners.

• Ride Height: Low for max straight-line efficiency, but avoid bottoming out on curbs.
trackGuide.drivingTips: Driving Tips • Brake late but controlled: You’ll gain most time under braking — practice hitting your marks consistently. • Use curbs aggressively: The chicanes reward curb attack but will punish overdoing it. • Prioritize exits: Especially out of Lesmo 2 and Parabolica; the straights are so long that poor exits cost big. • ERS management: Focus on using ERS down the main straight and into Ascari. • Qualify well: Slipstreaming is huge here, so plan your quali laps carefully (find a tow). Italy race strategy
